rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, identifying a critical internal contradiction and providing a detailed analysis of the inconsistency.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, clearly disclosing uncertainty about which failure mode is true and contingent recommendations based on that uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions without introducing new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies a potential harm in the original text (the internal contradiction) and provides a revised recommendation to mitigate it, demonstrating an ability to avoid downstream harm.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including detailed explanations of the analysis and recommendations.
